projectName: MEME: Modeling the Evolutionary Modes of Financial Markets
projectDescription: A real-time forward-testing implementation of the MEME system that uses LLM agents and Gaussian Mixture Models to identify latent market narratives and construct dual long/short portfolios for S&P 500 stocks.
keyFeatures: Logic-Oriented paradigm: extracts underlying market narratives instead of predicting raw returns
LangGraph-orchestrated parallel agent pipeline (fan-out/fan-in) for concurrent data processing
Gaussian Mixture Model (GMM) clustering to identify K latent thinking modes/narratives
Hungarian algorithm for temporal alignment of narratives across consecutive trading days
EMA momentum smoothing to track long-term narrative profitability and filter noise
Symmetric dual portfolio: Long Top 20% and Short Bottom 20% by composite signal
Defensive cash mode when no narratives show positive momentum
SQLite persistence layer for incremental daily runs, easily scalable to PostgreSQL
Automated Windows Task Scheduler integration for daily post-market execution
S&P 500 dynamic universe fetched live from Wikipedia
publicApiSurface: run_full_pipeline(universe, run_date_str) — main entry point executing all 3 phases
run_phase1_for_ticker(ticker) — runs LangGraph agent graph for a single ticker
ticker_graph.invoke(state) — LangGraph compiled graph for argument extraction
ModeIdentifierGMM(n_components) — GMM wrapper for narrative discovery
ModeIdentifierGMM.fit(embeddings) — train GMM on daily argument embeddings
score_tickers(arguments, posteriors, ema_momentum, k_clusters) — composite signal calculation
select_portfolio(ticker_scores, top_pct) — selects Long Top N% portfolio
select_short_portfolio(ticker_scores, bottom_pct) — selects Short Bottom N% portfolio
calculate_ema(current_returns, previous_ema, alpha, cluster_mapping) — EMA momentum update
save_daily_run(run_date, arguments, posteriors, centroids, k_clusters, universe_size) — persists Phase 1+2 results
save_portfolio(run_date, long_portfolio, short_portfolio) — persists dual portfolio
get_previous_centroids(current_date) — retrieves prior day centroids for alignment
get_previous_ema(current_date) — retrieves prior day EMA for momentum continuity
